basicInfo.name: Global Business Strategy Board Game Empire Builder
basicInfo.nameZh: 全球商业策略桌游帝国建造者

specifications.material: High-quality cardboard + wooden tokens + metal coins
features: Premium components (wooden meeples, metal coins, linen-finish cards)

pricing.packaging: Premium shelf-ready box with spot UV finish (24pcs/carton)

sellingPoints: Combines entertainment with financial literacy education
High replay value due to modular board design
Brings families together for quality time
Develops negotiation and strategic thinking skills
Competitive price point for premium component quality

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Build your business empire from scratch! Empire Builder is a strategic board game where players compete to create the most successful global company through trade, construction, and clever diplomacy. Perfect for family game night!
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 从零开始建立你的商业帝国！帝国建造者是一款策略桌游，玩家通过贸易、建筑和巧妙的外交竞争创建最成功的全球公司。完美的家庭游戏之夜选择！

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Conquer the Market – Global Strategy Game Empire Builder
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 征服市场——全球策略游戏帝国建造者
marketingCopy.bodyEn: Empire Builder transforms game night into a masterclass in business strategy. Players must balance resource management, market timing, and interpersonal negotiation to outmaneuver opponents. The modular board ensures no two games are alike, while premium wooden and metal components provide tactile satisfaction. It's entertainment that secretly teaches valuable life skills.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 帝国建造者将游戏之夜变成商业策略的大师课堂。玩家必须平衡资源管理、市场时机和人际谈判，以智取对手。模块化棋盘确保没有两场游戏是完全相同的，而优质的木质和金属组件提供触觉满足感。这是暗中教授宝贵生活技能的娱乐方式。
